name: @medina/sovereign-organism
description: AI Intelligence Organism — 8 SDKs, 26 browser extensions, 11 protocols, 30 callable tools. The organism IS the intelligence.

scripts.build:vigil: node -e "const fs=require('fs'),p='extensions/jarvis/sidepanel.html'; if(!fs.existsSync(p)) throw new Error('sidepanel.html not found'); console.log('[build:vigil] Vigil AI source OK — sidepanel.html ready.');"
scripts.start:desktop: cd desktop && npm install --prefer-offline && npm start

author: Medina
